name: MLB On-Base Percentage by Position
description: On-base percentage by field position for MLB players (2018). IMS Ch. 22.
studyDescription: Season statistics for all Major League Baseball players during the 2018 season. On-base percentage (OBP) was recorded along with each player's primary fielding position. The dataset includes players at all positions.

variableDescriptions.position: Primary fielding position: P (pitcher), C (catcher), 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF, or DH (designated hitter)
variableDescriptions.OBP: On-base percentage, the proportion of plate appearances resulting in reaching base

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS Ch. 22. Data from official 2018 MLB season statistics.

context.nullClaim: OBP is the same across all positions

inferenceContexts.parameter: at least one player position has a different mean on-base percentage
inferenceContexts.claim: there is a difference in mean OBP across player positions
